title: Fabulousy Enhanced Vanilla
description: Enhanced Vanilla Minecraft with a fps boost and some visual additions mods
body:
###  ⚡ **Faster Game**
**Fabulousy Enhanced Vanilla** is going to make the minecraft smoothly and fast, boosts performance and shorter loading times

###  🛹 **Powered by Fabric**
Fabric is a lightweight and client-side.

###  📚 **The Modpack** 
- 🖥️ **Better Performance**
- 🎨 **Shaders Support**
- 🖼️ **Included Resources Packs and Shaders**
- 🐛 **Bug Fixes**
- 🔷 **Essential Mod included**
- ⚒️ **Axiom Mod included**
- 🕹️ **Works on Multiplayer**
